title: Monitoring Continuity
summary: Chapter 2 opens in direct continuity with Ada's Chapter 1 commitment: she is already observing, logging, and waiting for pattern recurrence.

narrative.newInfo: Ada enters this chapter in method mode, not reset mode.
narrative.dripHook: The same watchfulness that calmed her now primes the rupture window.
narrative.payoffDelivered: Continuity reward: Chapter 1 decision has immediate narrative consequence.

rewardTokens.description: Ada is actively monitoring rather than passively waiting.
